summary: Build 208 is a LOCAL-ONLY CORRECTED real-customer pilot feedback-capture + next-decision packet. Build 207 closed with feedback_captured=false because the bracketed feedback fields were left unchanged. This build corrects that by capturing Jason's ACTUAL roofer-feedback summary (names/booleans/codes only): the real-customer pilot SMS was received and was clear AS A TECHNICAL DELIVERY TEST ONLY, but the message content did NOT validate RoofLeadHQ value because it was generic delivery-test copy; Jason will continue testing for delivery proof only and requests that the generic test SMS copy be analyzed and replaced before any future real workflow or customer-facing message. The next decision packet is MESSAGE_COPY_ANALYSIS_REQUIRED_BEFORE_NEXT_LIVE_SEND with recommended_option=A and four UNSIGNED options. It performs NO live action: no SMS, no Twilio, no network/external call, no retry, no roofer/homeowner contact, and reads/records no secret values, SIDs, tokens, credential values, phone numbers, or production data. It does NOT approve copy-revision sends, expansion, homeowner contact, live automation, or unrestricted launch. Launch remains pilot-gated, NOT unrestricted. Safety posture preserved: demo_ready_with_live_automation_disabled.

corrects_build_207.reason_for_correction: Build 207 placeholder feedback fields were left unchanged, so feedback was recorded as not_provided_by_jason; Build 208 captures Jason's actual corrected feedback.

real_customer_pilot_feedback_evidence.feedback_capture_note: Corrected capture of Jason's actual feedback. The real-customer pilot SMS was received and was clear as a technical delivery test only; the generic test message did NOT validate RoofLeadHQ value; Jason will continue testing for delivery proof only and requests the generic test SMS copy be analyzed and replaced before any future real workflow or customer-facing message.
real_customer_pilot_feedback_evidence.requested_changes_summary_names_only: Analyze and replace the generic test SMS copy before any future real workflow or customer-facing message. The text sent was only: 'RoofLeadHQ controlled live test: one-message SMS to your own consenting test identity (Test Roofing). No action needed.'
